creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I had two problems with this. 
#1, the patch to remove files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN didn't actually remove the file. 
#2, the patch for files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN doesn't apply cleanly: 

http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/index.php?action=display_markup_log&build=8-scheidell_AMD64&id=509#103 

could you make sure you update your portstree, verity the patches and resubmit the patch? 
Thanks.
